5. What the Game's Been Missing

6. What the Game's Been Missing

7. What the Game's Been Missing
Positive Aspects: Straight fiya tracks, Gangsta vibe, Heartfelt tracks, Improvement from previous album, Street authenticity

8. What the Game's Been Missing

9. What the Game's Been Missing
Positive Aspects: Juelz Santana's improvement, Bangin CD, Big ups to Juelz and Dipset crew

10. What the Game's Been Missing
